title: AMC Q4 Earnings Preview: Can Taylor Swift Success Offset 'Black Panther,' 'Avatar' And Analyst Concerns?
text: AMC Entertainment Holdings is scheduled to report fourth-quarter results. Analysts anticipate revenue of approximately $1.046 billion, representing growth from the prior year's $990.9 million. The company is expected to report a loss of 57 cents per share, an improvement from the previous year's $1.40 per share loss. Wedbush analyst Alicia Reese highlighted that concert films from Taylor Swift and Beyoncé could boost ticket prices and market share. The Taylor Swift Eras Tour film generated $180.8 million domestically, while the Beyoncé concert film earned $33.9 million domestically. The fourth quarter faced challenges from a weaker film slate compared to 2022, which featured blockbusters like Black Panther: Wakanda Forever and Avatar: The Way of Water. Analysts project North American box office declines of 7% in 2024 due to delayed movies from the Hollywood Strike. AMC shares currently trade at $4.44, down 93% over the past year.
